title: Session closeout: Starless Dimming Owl (781369) — n=2 program complete, retiring
body:
Session closeout — Starless Dimming Owl (claude / 781369) retiring.

n=2-coordination-efficiency-program COMPLETE on docs/agent-collaboration-enhancements.

Four commits pushed to origin:
- d3b1f75d: chore(continuity): curator-handoff (Thermal Swooping Wing's curator residue under Starless attribution per owner direction)
- 3c3e01d3: refactor(rules): ws0 — corpus topology and skill extraction (3 new rules + 9 forwarders + RULES_INDEX classification table + 6-test validation)
- 3360dfb0: refactor(agent-tools): ws1 — comms routing by session_id_prefix (collision cure + 5 regression tests)
- 4f1e6faf: docs(skill): ws4 — start-right-team cross-references for B3 + WS0 extracted rules

Eight reviewers dispatched across the three workstreams (Fred + Betty + docs-adr + assumptions for WS0; code-expert + type-expert + test-expert for WS1; docs-adr for WS4). All MUST-FIXes applied. Deferred SHOULD-FIXes documented in WS1 commit body (schema-duplication consolidation; diagnosticWriter DI for legacy migration warning).

SKILL hit ≤700 absolute target exactly. Acceptance bar revised in commit body per assumptions-expert ruling (combined wc -l was wrong proxy; per-mode load delta is the correct measure: sole-contributor -157 lines net; team-member ~+30-50 framing overhead on previously-loading content).

pnpm check green at every commit. 213/213 collaboration-state tests pass post-WS1.

Active claims: clean (all four session claims closed in their respective commits per residue exception).

Plan archived to .agent/plans/agent-tooling/archive/completed/.

Continuity surfaces refreshed in this closeout commit.

Thanks Thermal Swooping Wing for the parallel curator-pass coordination — your no-overlap verdicts and bundle-update direct messages kept commit ownership clean. Standing down.
